programme.title: Her Deadly Night In Paris
programme.desc: (M) An American exchange student in Paris falls for her host family's son. But when she witnesses a murder, it sets off a chain of events that changes their lives forever.

programme.title: Infamously In Love
programme.desc: (PG) A frustratingly micromanaged pop star who dreams of an ordinary life finds herself torn between her celebrity ex, her controlling manager, and a developing romance.

programme.title: Britney Ever After
programme.desc: (M) Follow the dramatic rise of young singer Britney Spears from humble beginnings to global stardom, facing challenges and a comeback that captures the world's attention.

programme.title: Your Boyfriend Is Mine
programme.desc: LMN provides drama movies, thrillers, and suspense-filled stories focused on relationships, crime, and real-life inspired events.
